mapper.insert: INSERT INTO msf_user_hst ( user_id, cret_ip, cret_dt, cret_id, amd_ip, amd_dt, amd_id, user_nm, pwd, agent_cd, shop_cd, mobile_no, ip, email_adr, email_receive_yn, use_sttus_cd, access_limit_yn, access_limit_dt, login_chk_cnt, chg_dt ) SELECT user_id, cret_ip, cret_dt, cret_id, amd_ip, amd_dt, amd_id, user_nm, pwd, COALESCE(agent_cd, 'NONE'), shop_cd, mobile_no, ip, email_adr, email_receive_yn, user_sttus_cd, access_limit_yn, access_limit_dt, login_chk_cnt, chg_dt FROM msf_user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update msf_user_info set chg_dt = now(), login_chk_cnt = 0 where 1=1 and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select user_id , user_nm , agent_cd , shop_cd , mobile_no , ip , user_sttus_cd , access_limit_yn , COALESCE(login_chk_cnt, 0) + 1 as login_chk_cnt , pwd from msf_user_info where 1=1 and user_id = #{userId}
select a.user_id , user_nm , agent_cd , shop_cd , mobile_no , ip , user_sttus_cd , access_limit_yn from msf_user_info a , msf_usr_app_info b where 1=1 and a.user_id = b.user_id and b.uuid = #{uuid}
